story_text_1: Luminary is an approachable, fine-dining experience with rustic textures and celestial inspiration. Guided by the vision of our founder, John Luminary, here our seasonally driven menu is informed by the surrounding environment, forest, field, and stream.
story_text_2: For over 10 years, Luminary has worked tirelessly to bolster a commitment to sustainability, ensuring that luxury doesn't have to come at the cost of our environment. Through thoughtful technique and carefully sourced ingredients, each dish is designed to reveal depth, contrast, and luminary discovery.
story_text_3: Guests can enjoy the warm, ethereal atmosphere, featuring an expansive outdoor patio and a dynamic bar, making it a perfect spot for any occasion. From a casual meal to an exquisite celebration, Luminary is  more than just a place to have a delicious meal; it’s where families bond, old friends reunite, and communities grow together.
story_text_4: Luminary - Celestial in Spirit. Precise in Execution.
chef_text_1: Executive Chef Brie Lumière builds each dish around the idea of illumination revealing the full potential of an ingredient through precision, contrast, and clarity. Combining inspiration from the generosity from the land and sea, she hones in on sharpening flavors, refining textures, and composing plates that allow each ingredient to be seen, tasted, and understood.
chef_text_2: At Luminary, illumination means elevating the dining experience through careful sourcing and craftsmanship. Seasonal ingredients are treated with care and intention, guided by classical technique and a contemporary approach, creating dishes that feel both refined and expressive.
chef_text_3: Executive Chef Brie Lumière builds each dish around the idea of illumination, revealing the full potential of an ingredient through precision, contrast, and clarity. Combining inspiration from the generosity from the land and sea, her focus is on sharpening flavors, refining textures, and composing plates that allow each ingredient to be seen, tasted, and understood.
chef_text_4: At Luminary, we elevate the dining experience through careful sourcing and craftsmanship. Seasonal ingredients are treated with care and intention, guided by classical technique and a contemporary approach, creating dishes that feel both refined and expressive.
